result.description: Brice Turang flies out to left fielder Whit Merrifield.
William Contreras grounds out, third baseman Alec Bohm to first baseman Bryce Harper.
Kyle Schwarber singles on a ground ball to right fielder Sal Frelick, deflected by first baseman Rhys Hoskins.
Nick Castellanos flies out to center fielder Blake Perkins.
Bryce Harper walks. Kyle Schwarber to 2nd.
Alec Bohm flies out to right fielder Sal Frelick.
